---
applyTo: "paper/**"
---

# Paper

- Generate tables from documented artifacts and identify split/provenance.
- A LeWM-framed title requires Gate 7; a locked-test metric requires Gate 10.
- Do not claim SOTA, temporal localization without spans, or real-time performance without FPS.
- Keep the current IEEE scaffold provisional; migrate to Springer/LNCS when the target venue
  format is confirmed.
